title: Waymo Takes On London
description: We’re taking the next step toward bringing fully autonomous ride-hailing to London this year with the start of autonomous driving with trained specialists behind the wheel. title: AGIBOT deploys semi-humanoid robots in electronics manufacturing
description:
Longcheer has integrated multiple AGIBOT G2 robots into its tablet production lines, and plans to deploy 100 by Q3 2026. 
The post AGIBOT deploys semi-humanoid robots in electronics manufacturing appeared first on The Robot Report.

description: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

description: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.

title: OpenAI launches biopharma-focused AI model to compete with Anthropic
description:
OpenAI is the latest tech giant to move into biopharma, announcing a life sciences-focused AI offering on Thursday.

title: Anthropic CPO leaves Figma’s board after reports he will offer a competing product
description: Krieger's departure and any forthcoming design tools will be another data point for investors who fear the SaaSpocalypse — that the largest AI labs will come to dominate software businesses, a thesis that has rocked public markets at times this year.

title: The Battle for OpenAI’s Soul
description: In Musk v. Altman, a jury will soon determine whether OpenAI has strayed from its founding mission to ensure AGI benefits humanity. Here’s what to know.

title: Starlink outage hit drone tests, exposing Pentagon’s growing reliance on SpaceX
description: Last August, a global outage across Elon Musk’s satellite network left U.S. Navy unmanned surface vessels bobbing off California, halting operations.

title: XAI Renting GPUs to Cursor – Further GPU Rents Enables Breakeven
description: It is being reported that xAI will rent tens of thousands of GPUS to AI coding company Cursor. It is about $2.5-18 per hour for GPU rentals. description: Blue Origin New Glenn 3 has a good static fire. They are trying to go for a Saturday or Sunday launch. title: Anthropic Plots Major London Expansion
description: As tensions with the US government mount, Anthropic has leased a new office with enough space to quadruple its 200-person head count in London.

title: Ouster releases Stereolabs ZED X Nano wrist-mounted camera
description:
Ouster's ED X Nano camera mounts directly onto robotic wrists and end-of-arm tooling, where every millimeter matters.

title: Rivian partners with Tesla co-founder’s Redwood on energy storage
description:
Rivian is partnering with Redwood Materials, the battery company founded by Tesla co-founder JB Straubel, to build a second-life battery energy storage system at its EV manufacturing plant in Normal, Illinois.

title: Uber begins early test rides of Lucid Gravity robotaxis equipped with Nuro autonomy systems
description:
Level 4 autonomous technology expert Nuro shared the latest milestone of a partnership with Uber Technologies and Lucid Motors to develop a fleet of Gravity Robotaxi SUVs. Per the company, a select group of riders has begun test rides in California.

description:

title: Novo taps OpenAI to deploy AI across R&D, manufacturing and corporate functions
description: The AI will be used to analyze complex datasets and shrink R&amp;D timelines, Novo said. It'll additionally use the tech to seek efficiencies across manufacturing and corporate functions.
